name: @nps-kit/agents
description: NOP (Neural Orchestration Protocol) reference kit — mailbox-based multi-agent orchestration per NPS-5. Wraps any AI agent runtime (reference impl uses Claude Code CLI) with a portable task-dispatch protocol.

scripts.test: bash -lc 'command -v bats >/dev/null || { echo "bats not found; install bats-core to run kits/agents tests" >&2; exit 1; }; bats tests'
